creator: muxas@mail.ru
text:
Created attachment 154138
The archive contains patches for 2 ports: net/remmina and net/remmina-plugins

Hi!

I upgraded remmina ports to the latest stable version 1.1.2. Also I changed the default gnome environment that the ports are compiled for from 2 to 3.

Ports changed:
net/remmina
net/remmina-plugins

Files added/removed for net/remmina:
> svn add files/patch-remmina-plugins_CMakeLists.txt.diff
> svn add files/patch-remmina-plugins_vnc_CMakeLists.txt.diff
> svn add files/patch-remmina_CMakeLists.txt.diff

No files were added or removed for net/remmina-plugins.

These ports are dependant so I put them into one report. Please, see attached archive with patches.

Best regards,
Maxim Vetrov
